data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Optional two-step verification process for additional security.
data.technical_spec: Passwords and OTPs as additional layers beyond standard login.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption by Default
data.description: Encryption safeguards privacy by making messages readable only to sender and receiver.
data.technical_spec: Signal Protocol for state-of-the-art cryptographic security.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Ongoing assessments to identify vulnerabilities and patch them.
data.technical_spec: Bug bounty programs and penetration testing implemented.

data.title: Suspicious Activity Monitoring
data.description: Automated systems to flag and restrict suspicious interactions.
data.technical_spec: Algorithms and pattern recognition to detect unusual logins.

data.title: Secure Media Transfer
data.description: Encrypted file transfers to protect media shared between users.
data.technical_spec: Transport Layer Security (TLS) for upload/download processes.
